texto: London has such an unbelievable respect for theater, where L.A. does not. You go to a play here, and the dude next to you is sleeping. In London, if you're not in your seat when it starts, they lock the door. In Los Angeles, you can stroll into school late with a cup of coffee. In London, you get your butt to class on time.
explicacao: Citação de Devin Kelley sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “London has such an unbelievable respect for theater, where L.A. does not. You go to a play here, …” articula educacao, time, coffee em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como coffee e school.
